programme.title: Love Blossoms
programme.desc: Perfumer Violet is desperate to formulate her late father's unfinished signature scent. Under great pressure to finish by Valentine's Day, Violet hires an inexperienced botanist with an uncanny ability to identify scents.

programme.title: Stranded in Paradise
programme.desc: When a HR exec loses her job, she travels to Puerto Rico for a business conference. But as the trip becomes a disaster and a hurricane shuts down the whole island, she meets a handsome traveler who gives her a new perspective.

programme.title: The Beach House
programme.desc: When Cara finds her life spinning out of control, she returns to the scenic Lowcountry to visit her mother. Before long, the rhythms of the island open her heart in wonderful ways as she repairs the family beach house.

programme.title: The Sweeter Side of Life
programme.desc: Pampered Manhattan housewife Desiree Harper has it all. That is until her husband unexpectedly dumps her. Faced with an airtight prenup, Desiree reluctantly lands a job making cupcakes at her father's struggling bakery.

programme.title: Big Sky River
programme.desc: Tara needs to go back to Parable, Montana, the place that made her the happiest, in order to move forward after a messy divorce. Her handsome neighbor presents an unexpected twist. Starring Emmanuelle Vaugier, Kavan Smith.

programme.title: The Magic of Ordinary Days
programme.desc: Pregnant out of wedlock, an educated young woman is pressured by her father into an arranged marriage with a lonely farmer in this drama set during WWII. Stars Keri Russell and Skeet Ulrich.

programme.title: One Summer
programme.desc: Jack takes his son and daughter to his late wife's beachside hometown hoping to heal and become closer. The summer brings visions of the past that could forge a new path forward. Stars Sam Page, Sarah Drew and Amanda Schull.

programme.title: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Pilot
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, English professor Amy uses her crime fiction expertise to unravel the case faster than detective Travis, who ends up working with Amy to catch the killer. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: A Summer Romance
programme.desc: Samantha's Montana ranch is her family's legacy, so when a developer shows up to buy it, Sam isn't interested. But as he tries to win her trust and her ranch, Sam finds he might also be winning her heart. Erin Krakow, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: The Nine Lives of Christmas
programme.desc: Zachary Stone, a handsome bachelor with distaste for responsibility, sees his life change before his eyes when he decides to adopt a stray cat.

programme.title: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Back for the third installment, Frankie and Nate manage life on the vineyard and plan a wedding in secret! Stars Rachael Leigh Cook and Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Love to the Rescue
programme.desc: Two single parents come head to head when their kids want to adopt the same dog. Agreeing to co-foster, free-spirited Kate and type-A Eric must work together to find the dog's forever home. Starring Nikki DeLoach and Michael Rady.

programme.title: Color My World with Love
programme.desc: Emma's daughter Kendall becomes engaged, but Emma is concerned as Kendall and her fiancé have Down Syndrome and Emma worries she's not ready to take this step. Stars Lily D. Moore, Erica Durance, Benjamin Ayres, David DeSanctis.

programme.title: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: Marketing executive, Josie, returns home when she becomes the unexpected guardian of her niece and nephew. While there, she reconnects with Cooper, her high school boyfriend. Stars Lacey Chabert, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: All of My Heart
programme.desc: A young caterer's life suddenly changes when she inherits a country home and learns she must share it with a career-obsessed Wall Street trader. Sparks fly when they have to work side-by-side.

programme.title: All of My Heart: Inn Love
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are engaged and preparing for the grand opening of their bed and breakfast. But when a big storm hits Bucks County, all their plans end up sopping wet.

programme.title: All of My Heart: The Wedding
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are planning their wedding at the Inn where they fell in love. When a distant relative arrives and stakes their claim to the Inn, Brian and Jenny must find a way to save their beloved Inn or risk having to sell.

programme.title: The Color of Rain
programme.desc: When Gina loses her husband on Christmas Day, she soon finds a kindred spirit in another parent at her kids' school, Michael, who loses his wife at the same time. Stars Lacey Chabert and Warren Christie.

programme.title: A Country Wedding
programme.desc: A country western star returns to his hometown to sell his childhood home prior to his wedding. Upon his arrival, he meets the girl he proposed to when he was 8-years-old and she helps plan the wedding in his fiances absence.

programme.title: Royally Ever After
programme.desc: Danny proposes to Sara and reveals he is the prince of St. Ives. They need his disapproving parents' blessing. Sara must fight to remain true to herself, while adjusting to this new lifestyle.

programme.title: A Picture of Her
programme.desc: Beth unwittingly becomes the subject of an award-winning magazine's cover and goes on a quest to uncover the true identity of the mystery photographer who snapped her photo. Stars Tyler Hynes, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: Just My Type
programme.desc: Vanessa interviews author Martin Clayborne and reevaluates her writing career. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz, Brett Dalton.

programme.title: The Reluctant Royal
programme.desc: Philly mechanic Johnny is surprised to learn that his long-lost father is a duke. But the duke isn't quite what he expected, nor are his growing feelings for the duke's advisor Prudence. Stars Andrew Walker, Emilie de Ravin.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Wedding
programme.desc: A meddling woman wins her sister an all-paid-for Beverly Hills Wedding, but is disappointed to learn her ex will be invited along to help plan. Stars Brooke D'Orsay & Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Double Scoop
programme.desc: Nora discovers the best ice cream and hopes to land them as a client. Her sweet dreams hit a snag when her former colleague James has the same idea. Old sparks begin to melt the frosty tension. Stars Taylor Cole, Ryan McPartlin.

programme.title: A Taste of Summer
programme.desc: Gabby moves to Bright Shore where she opens a restaurant and rediscovers her passion. She encounters Caleb, a former baseball player with a competitive streak who owns his own restaurant. Stars Roselyn Sanchez, Eric Winter.

programme.title: Two for Tee
programme.desc: Tee is a Chinese American pottery artist who meets new community center handyman Will. As she learns about her family's traditions through art, can she and Will save the center from closure? Stars Janel Parrish, Chris McNally.

programme.title: Junebug
programme.desc: Juniper, a book editor turning 40, is magically reconnected with an eight-year-old version of herself who questions her life choices, including the dream of writing her own stories. Stars Autumn Reeser, Aaron O'Connell.

programme.title: Sand Dollar Cove
programme.desc: Stamford developer Elli works on acquiring beachfront property in Sand Dollar Cove, a quaint Connecticut beach town, but falls for the town's charm and property owner in the process. Chad Michael Murray, Aly Michalka, Clare Bowen.

programme.title: Making Waves
programme.desc: When a music label executive goes to a festival on the Outer Banks to beat out the competition for an elusive new band, she discovers that the group is fronted by her childhood summer sweetheart. Stars Holland Roden, Corey Cott.

programme.title: My One & Only
programme.desc: Contestants on The One, Stephanie and Oliver try to determine if they're fated to be together. Meanwhile, sparks fly between Stephanie and Alex, the handsome ranch owner who acts as their guide. Stars Pascale Hutton and Sam Page.

programme.title: Wedding Every Weekend
programme.desc: Nate and Brooke are going to the same four weddings, four weekends in a row. To avoid set-ups, they go together as "wedding buddies." But what starts as a friendship soon becomes deeper. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Matching Hearts
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day nears, a matchmaker is tasked by her mentor to find a match for an entrepreneur who believes staying single is the key to success. Stars Taylor Cole and Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: An Unexpected Valentine
programme.desc: A chance encounter on Valentine's Day brings Hannah and Finn together as they race through New York City to return a lost engagement ring and save one couple's special day. Stars Lacey Chabert, Robert Buckley.

programme.title: Betty's Bad Luck in Love
programme.desc: Cursed from childhood to fail at romance, Betty's relationships have always ended in disaster. But when she meets Alex, she's tempted to try once more. Can true love prevail over a curse? Stars Laci J. Mailey, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: The Love Heist
programme.desc: Celebrity stylist Kayli must team up with hotel security chief Mills to track down an iconic piece of fashion history after it goes missing on her watch before the Chicago Costume Gala. Stars Lyndsy Fonseca, Peter Porte.

programme.title: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: When the founder of a high-end fashion company gets marooned on an "deserted" island with a chef, romance blossoms as they work together to survive. Starring Lacey Chabert and Ian Harding.

programme.title: Missing the Boat
programme.desc: Strangers Kelly and Parker both end up on the same Italian cruise, but after missing the boat during a stop, they're forced to team up and race across southern Italy to catch up. Stars Emilie Ullerup and Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: The Greek Aisle
programme.desc: When Georgia travels to the Greek island of Corfu to finalize an inheritance, she unexpectedly discovers that marrying her handsome co-inheritor is the only way to meet the requirements. Stars Nikki DeLoach, Apostolis Totsikas.

programme.title: Christmas Getaway
programme.desc: Hoping to spend the holiday relaxing, a travel writer takes a traditional Christmas vacation for the first time. Through a rental mix up, she finds herself double booked for the holiday. Stars Bridget Regan, Travis Van Winkle.

programme.title: Holiday Touchdown: A Chiefs Love Story (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: Chiefs superfan Alana tries to win the Fan of the Year Award as a Christmas gift for her family, falling in love with someone in the Chiefs front office along the way. Stars Hunter King, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: On the 12th Date of Christmas
programme.desc: Two co-workers vying for the same promotion are tasked to create a 12 Days of Christmas scavenger hunt to promote the premiere of a new hotel. Stars Mallory Jansen and Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: Steven recruits holiday coordinator Gretchen to bring Christmas joy to his family. Neither expected the Christmas spirit to bring them closer to each other. Stars Alexa PenaVega and Jonathan Bennett.

programme.title: The Christmas Cup
programme.desc: Marine Kelly leads her hometown team in the Christmas Cup against the neighboring town with help from Fireman Quinn. That is until he becomes the competition. Starring Rhiannon Fish and Ben Rosenbaum.

programme.title: Christmas Under the Lights
programme.desc: Emily reluctantly returns home to her family's rescue ranch to organize the Christmas Carnival and works with a handsome artist to honor her mother. Starring Heather Hemmens, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: The Royal Nanny
programme.desc: MI5 agent Claire goes undercover as the royal nanny, and must overcome the challenges of her assignment, like resisting the charms of Prince Colin while keeping the family safe at Christmas. Stars Rachel Skarsten, Dan Jeannotte.

programme.title: Mystery on Mistletoe Lane
programme.desc: New to town, Heidi Wicks and her kids discover a Christmas mystery in their historic home. Local handyman and historian David helps along the way, finding his own surprising connection. Starring Victor Webster and Erica Cerra.

programme.title: Poison in a Pear Tree - Part 1
programme.desc: Christmas shop owner Emily Lane uses secret skills to investigate a murder when a poisoned cookie links her to the crime. Detective Sam Wilner navigates the holidays with daughter Violet. Stars Sarah Drew and Peter Mooney.

programme.title: Poison in a Pear Tree - Part 2
programme.desc: With time running out to prove her friend's innocence, Emily puts her own secret past on the line to find the real tree farm killer, raising suspicion from Detective Sam Wilner. Stars Sarah Drew and Peter Mooney.

programme.title: A Little Christmas Charm
programme.desc: When Holly finds a lost charm bracelet, she teams up with an investigative reporter to return it to the rightful owner by Christmas Eve. Stars Ashley Greene and Brendan Penny.

programme.title: A Newport Christmas
programme.desc: The charitable Ella heads out on a boat in 1905 and ends up in 2025. Nick has to figure out how to get her back in time-and decide if their newfound love can stand the test of it. Starring Ginna Claire Mason, Wes Brown.

programme.title: Never Kiss a Man in a Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: Single mom Maggie is facing Christmas alone until Lucas crashes into her life and becomes an unexpected houseguest. Together they overcome Christmas while finding comfort in their growing bond. Stars Ashley Williams, Niall Matter.

programme.title: 'Tis the Season to be Merry
programme.desc: Looking for a fresh angle to her book on relationships, Merry heads to snow covered Vermont. She finds a new perspective and Christmas cheer with charismatic aid worker Adam. Starring Rachael Leigh Cook and Travis Van Winkle.

programme.title: Rescuing Christmas
programme.desc: Erin is granted 3 Christmas wishes – with her final wish being that Christmas would just disappear. And to her bewilderment, it does! Can potential suitor Sam help her bring back Christmas? Stars Rachael Leigh Cook, Sam Page.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Claus
programme.desc: Avery Quinn's shot at anchoring news clashes with a Santa-suited intruder, Chris, who insists he's Santa's son on a first Christmas mission. They unravel a career-making story together. Starring Italia Ricci and Luke MacFarlane.

programme.title: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: When historian Jessica is hired to create The Plaza's Christmas display, she finds more than facts while teaming up with handsome decorator Nick to bring the display to life. Starring Elizabeth Henstridge and Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: A Grand Ole Opry Christmas (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: Grand Ole Opry magic takes Gentry and her friend, Mac, back in time to Christmas 1995. There, she's able to spend time with her late country star dad, as well as discover romance with Mac. Starring Nikki DeLoach, Kris Polaha.

programme.title: A Very Merry Mix-Up
programme.desc: A woman goes to meet her fiancé's family at Christmas and winds up at the wrong house. Once the mistake is corrected, she realizes that her bond with the wrong family, and their eligible son, was stronger than she expected.

programme.title: The Christmas Note
programme.desc: Gretchen returns to her hometown with son Ethan and meets her new neighbor Melissa. Melissa's mother has passed away, and the two form a reluctant friendship when Melissa discovers she has a sibling she never knew about.

programme.title: Poison in a Pear Tree - Part 2
programme.desc: With time running out to prove her friend's innocence, Emily puts her own secret past on the line to find the real tree farm killer, raising suspicion from Detective Sam Wilner. Stars Sarah Drew and Peter Mooney.

programme.title: Family History Mysteries: Buried Past
programme.desc: Genealogist Sophie McClaren is an expert at bringing families together. When her close friend JONATHAN urgently needs to find a bone marrow donor, the case becomes personal. Stars Janel Parrish and Niall Matter.

programme.title: The Dancing Detective: A Deadly Tango
programme.desc: A no-nonsense detective must reluctantly team up with a charismatic British dance star in order to solve a murder. Stars Lacey Chabert, Will Kemp.

programme.title: True Justice: Family Ties
programme.desc: A law school student and her friends, set out to prove her brother's innocence but the only way to clear his name is by finding the real killer. Stars Katherine McNamara, Markian Tarasiuk, Nikki DeLoach, Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Dying for Chocolate
programme.desc: Colorado caterer Goldy Berry teams with detective Tom Schultz to identify the ingredients that led to the mysterious death of her friend — and ends up discovering a hidden recipe for murder. Stars Nikki Deloach and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Grilling Season
programme.desc: Caterer Goldy Berry reunites with detective Tom Schultz when a realtor is murdered. As they uncover personal and professional rivalries, they realize the culprit is closer than expected. Stars Nikki DeLoach, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Fatal Vows
programme.desc: When Goldy agreed to cater Tom's ex Jessamyn's elaborate wedding, she didn't expect a dead groom and missing bridezilla would bring her together with Tom again, to catch a killer and find Jess. Stars Nikki DeLoach & Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Foiled Plans
programme.desc: Goldy Berry's Medieval feast at Hyde Castle gets interrupted by a murder. She teams up with Detective Shultz to solve the mystery before the murderer strikes again. Nikki DeLoach, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Goldy Berry caters a VIP concert and goes on a date with Tom. Starring Nikki DeLoach and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Gilded Newport Mysteries: Murder at the Breakers
programme.desc: A society page writer in 1895 Rhode Island witnesses a murder while attending a ball at the Vanderbilt mansion and is drawn into the investigation when her brother is arrested. Stars Ali Skovbye, Danny Griffin, Nathan Witte.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Something New
programme.desc: Young Aurora Teagarden returns home to Lawrenceton after college to pursue her post-grad degree and finds herself embroiled in a mystery involving her friend Sally's fiancé. Stars Skyler Samuels, Evan Roderick, Marilu Henner.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: A Lesson in Murder
programme.desc: When a student from Aurora's true crime literature class is found murdered outside the diner where she works, Aurora takes it upon herself to figure out the real culprit. Stars Skyler Samuels, Evan Roderick, and Marilu Henner.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Death at the Diner
programme.desc: When the owner of the diner where Aurora Teagarden works is suddenly killed, her new boyfriend becomes the primary suspect! Stars Skyler Samuels, Evan Roderick and Marilu Henner.

programme.title: CrimeTime: Freefall
programme.desc: Crime series actress Hadley Warner retires to a small town where she encounters her first real case. Using her TV crime knowledge, she teams up with Detective Caden to solve the case. Starring Lyndie Greenwood, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Pilot
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, English professor Amy uses her crime fiction expertise to unravel the case faster than detective Travis, who ends up working with Amy to catch the killer. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Playing Dead
programme.desc: The local theater is producing a mystery that crime fiction expert Amy unearthed. When one of the actress' life is threatened, Amy & Travis must uncover which character is playing for keeps. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Words Can Kill
programme.desc: When a guest at the college book festival is killed, Amy and Travis clash after he arrests an unlikely person for murder. Amy must fight to prove he's got the wrong person behind bars. Starring Jill Wagner and Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Dead Talk
programme.desc: Amy heads to Seattle to give a TED Talk-style lecture. When a tech genius dies, Amy suspects foul play. When local cops shut her out, Travis joins forces with Amy to figure out whodunit. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: An Education in Murder
programme.desc: A young writer's research prompts the police to revisit a famous murder case that convicted Amy's colleague at Elmstead, so Travis & Amy get a second chance at clearing the professor's name. Stars Jill Wagner & Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Killer Timing
programme.desc: An escaped serial killer and an attempt on Travis's life makes this their most dangerous case yet as Amy and Travis team up with his FBI agent ex to find the connection before it's too late. Stars Jill Wagner & Kristoffer Polaha.
